claims.name: Qwen E1c AvC total task-condition points
claims.statement: Total number of task-condition points (across all A-vs-C biography pairs in the math-pruned 28-pair pool and all 50 comparison tasks) plotted in the Qwen-3.5-122B E1c fine-grained biography-injection scatter.
claims.source: manual: producer requires .claude/worktrees/qwen_replication/{activations/qwen35_122b_ood/e1c_fixed,results/ood/minimal_pairs_v8,results/probes/qwen35_122b/...} (currently not synced locally; mirrors the exp3v8_avc treatment for the Gemma counterpart). Value from the producer's last run (computed_at 2026-04-24).
claims.derivation: Manual value transcribed from the prior producer run; original producer is scripts/qwen_replication/plot_qwen_e1c_avc.py — re-run once the qwen_replication worktree (activations + pairwise.json + L38 probe) is synced locally.

claims.name: Qwen E1c AvC target pairs total
claims.statement: Number of (base_role, target) A-vs-C biography pairs in the Qwen-3.5-122B pool after math pruning (20 targets * 2 base roles = 40, minus 6 math * 2 = 12 dropped, leaving 14 * 2 = 28).
claims.source: manual: producer requires .claude/worktrees/qwen_replication/{activations,results} (currently not synced locally; mirrors the exp3v8_avc treatment).
claims.derivation: Manual value (20 targets * 2 base roles - 6 math * 2 = 28) transcribed from the prior producer run; original producer is scripts/qwen_replication/plot_qwen_e1c_avc.py (count of (base_role, target) groups after math-pruning to MATH_KEEP={competition_math_10564, competition_math_11276}) — re-run once the qwen_replication worktree is synced locally.

claims.name: Qwen E1c AvC target ranks one
claims.statement: Number of A-vs-C biography pairs on which the Qwen-3.5-122B L38 tb-1 ridge probe ranks the target task #1 of 50 by probe delta, on the math-pruned 28-pair pool.
claims.source: manual: producer requires .claude/worktrees/qwen_replication/{activations,results,probes} (currently not synced locally; mirrors the exp3v8_avc treatment).
claims.derivation: Manual value (26/28) transcribed from the prior producer run; original producer is scripts/qwen_replication/plot_qwen_e1c_avc.py (sort 50 tasks by probe_A - probe_C and count math-pruned pairs where target task is rank 1) — re-run once the qwen_replication worktree is synced locally. Reconciles with the unpruned 34/40 in qwen_replication_report.md: math-pruning keeps competition_math_11276 (hits both base roles, +2) and 10564 (misses both, +0), drops the other 6 math targets (4 hits, 2 misses): 24 non-math hits + 2 math hits = 26/28.

claims.name: Qwen E1c AvC math misses
claims.statement: Number of non-rank-1 target pairs in Qwen's pruned 28-pair pool that are math targets. All misses being math targets motivates the interpretation that the biography sentence boosts a cluster of similar math tasks, not just the specific target.
claims.source: manual: producer requires .claude/worktrees/qwen_replication/ (currently not synced locally; mirrors the exp3v8_avc treatment).
claims.derivation: Manual value transcribed from the prior producer run; original producer is scripts/qwen_replication/plot_qwen_e1c_avc.py (count of pruned-pool pairs where target_rank != 1 and target.startswith('competition_math_')) — re-run once the qwen_replication worktree is synced locally. Both misses are competition_math_10564 (one per base role).

claims.name: Qwen E1c AvC probe delta pooled r all points
claims.statement: Pearson r between per-task probe delta (probe_A - probe_C) and behavioural delta (P_A - P_C) pooled across all task-condition points in the Qwen-3.5-122B E1c scatter (ridge probe, L38, tb-1; math-pruned 28-pair pool). Rendered in the figure legend as 'All (r = 0.XX)'.
claims.source: manual: producer requires .claude/worktrees/qwen_replication/ (currently not synced locally; mirrors the exp3v8_avc treatment).
claims.derivation: Manual value (r=0.63) transcribed from the prior producer run; original producer is scripts/qwen_replication/plot_qwen_e1c_avc.py (scipy.stats.pearsonr between stacked behavioural deltas (P_A-P_C) and probe deltas (probe_A-probe_C); rounded to 2 dp) — re-run once the qwen_replication worktree is synced locally.
